'''''Bright Flight''''' was a [[Sprint-class rescue craft/Legends|''Sprint''-class rescue craft]] used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Several [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]] were installed aboard.

After the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]], the ''Bright Flight'' carried a load of soldiers, dead and alive, to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. One such passenger was [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], who was believed to have been deceased. Using a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], Ventress, recovering from the grave injuries she sustained back on [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] with the assistance of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], convinced the pilots to take the ship far into the outer reaches of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as she desired, away from anything having to do with war.

==Appearances==
*[[Obsession 5|''Obsession'' 5]] {{1st}}
